# VelopackRuntimeInfo class

Namespace: [`Velopack`](./index.md)

Convenience class which provides runtime information about the current executing process, 
in a way that is safe in older and newer versions of the framework.

```cs
public static class VelopackRuntimeInfo
```

## Properties

| Property | Summary |
| --- | --- |
| [`VelopackDisplayVersion`](#velopackdisplayversion) | The current compiled Velopack display version. |
| [`VelopackNugetVersion`](#velopacknugetversion) | The current compiled Velopack NuGetVersion. |
| [`VelopackProductVersion`](#velopackproductversion) | The current compiled Velopack ProductVersion. |
| [`SystemArch`](#systemarch) | The current machine architecture, ignoring the current process / pe architecture. |
| [`SystemOs`](#systemos) | The name of the current OS - eg. 'windows', 'linux', or 'osx'. |
| [`SystemRid`](#systemrid) | The current system RID. |
| [`IsWindows`](#iswindows) | True if executing on a Windows platform. |
| [`IsLinux`](#islinux) | True if executing on a Linux platform. |
| [`IsOSX`](#isosx) | True if executing on a MacOS / OSX platform. |
